basis: Two clean high-effort failures preserved under this level; no promoted solver.
objective: Avoid repeating raw-frame breadth-first search and turn the observed phase changes into a compact symbolic controller.
required_first_checks: Read frontier_brief.md and run the smallest preserved probe before creating a new probe.
Reconfirm env.actions and one representative coordinate click on a fresh clone.
Separate avatar position, revealed yellow-tile set, and phase/layout index in the state key.
search_change: Search over macro actions: move to the next horizontal trigger and click the currently visible yellow components.
Use phase/layout transitions as progress; do not key on the 64-pixel action-history row.

Do not retain thousands of full Arena clones: local reproduction showed recursive deepcopy dominating for more than two minutes. Retain compact paths/keys and reconstruct a node from one root clone when expanding it.
Cap each symbolic search before writing solver code, and preserve the best path plus frontier statistics.
known_unverified_observations: Actions 3 and 4 move a small avatar horizontally in six-pixel increments.
Coordinate action 6 removes a clicked yellow component and reveals traversable cells.
Moving right across a trigger changes the visible yellow layout; clearing only the initial yellow set does not win.
The preserved 30k-state BFS produced no reward/frontier output before manual termination because repeated full-clone deepcopy dominated runtime.
